feature.name: HTTP/1.1 message parse and state machine
feature.description: Extract h11 Connection state machine for parsing and framing HTTP/1.1 request/response messages.
included_behaviors: parse request and response start-lines and headers
frame bodies with content-length and chunked encoding
surface protocol errors for malformed messages
serialize events back to wire bytes
excluded_behaviors: HTTP/2 or WebSocket upgrades beyond state flags

entanglement.description: HTTP parsing couples connection role state, incremental buffers, and event readers/writers.

output.import: from featurelifted import Connection, CLIENT, SERVER, Request, Response, Data, EndOfMessage, NEED_DATA, RemoteProtocolError
